query:
SELECT pv.variantCode, pv.variantName, pv.sellingPriceFOB, vp.sellingPriceFobL1, vp.sellingPriceFobL2, vp.sellingPriceFobL3, vp.isCurrent
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId AND vp.isCurrent = true
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V033'
LIMIT 5;
